details.test: Task 1: Order largest B&W cityscape print under $60 with free shipping
Task 2: Build multi-print order with style filters and budget constraints
Task 3: Submit custom pet portrait commission request
Task 4: Create account and save default shipping address
Task 5: Save oldest Urban Nights artwork to favorites and reopen from favorites
Task 6: Choose cheaper format of Silent Forest at 16x20 and add to cart
Task 9: Add highly rated print under $80 in largest size (floral or best available)
Task 7: Start checkout and select fastest shipping under $25
Task 8: Subscribe to newsletter and read newest Studio Process blog post
